title: Harmony I
description: A seamless and enjoyable modpack that transforms Minecraft with well-balanced development, fresh mobs, and mechanisms. Bronze progression, explore structures, complete quests, and dive into a world where every mod tastes like vanilla.
body: Prismarine offers an experience that closely resembles vanilla gameplay. It boasts a clean and tasteful environment, where every addition seamlessly integrates with existing mechanics. Embark on a journey of quests, explore diverse biomes, construct your dream house, and upgrade your tools. Whether you prefer a solitary adventure or to team up with your closest companions.
